chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-361 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Sarfaraz Ahmed s/o Bashir Ahmed Ansari Through Mr.Kaleem Ahmed Mirza, Advocate. Nemo. Respondent: Mst.Zain Chudrigar w/o Sarfaraz Ahmed. Nemo. Date of hearing: 04.11.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above- titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
